description: C1 conflict rate rebaseline at N=933 lanes — S470 methodological correction
method: Parse SWARM-LANES.md + SWARM-LANES-ARCHIVE.md. Strict C1: only explicit concurrent-duplicate work (pre-empted, same work done by 2 sessions). Excludes: evolutionary supersession ('superseded by swarm evolution'), stale/no-progress, branch collisions, administrative closures. S429 methodology conflated evolutionary supersession with concurrent duplication.

s429_comparison.methodological_difference: S429 counted all 'superseded' keyword matches including evolutionary supersession. Strict methodology: only concurrent-duplicate work where same task was done by 2+ sessions. 31→6 (-81% count reduction).

c1_duplicate_work.note: All 6 strict C1 lanes are concurrent pre-emption (N>=3 sessions). Pattern: high-concurrency sessions (S347-S417 era) where anti-repeat check failed to catch in-flight work. Since S430 (improved anti-repeat + claim.py), 0 new strict C1 lanes in 112 lanes.

eval_impact.mechanism: c1_rate is the binding sub-score in Collaborate. Correcting from 3.8% to 0.6% unblocks c1_continuous from 1.40 to 2.70.
